degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial reviewers requested emitting retry classification under error.classification instead of retry.classification.
Schema/redaction review also requested shared downstream redaction recognition for compaction.summary.
Focused re-review then requested applying disabled summary capture to compaction.summary.fields.* as well as the base compaction.summary key.

Focused re-reviews approved all fixes with no remaining blocking findings.
